text:
Certainly! Here's a comprehensive REST API design for a collaborative document editing platform that supports real-time collaboration, versioning, and access control.

---

## 1. **Resource Overview**

| Resource             | Description                                              |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| `/documents`       | Collection of documents                                  |
| `/documents/{id}`  | Specific document resource                               |
| `/documents/{id}/versions` | Version history of a document                     |
| `/documents/{id}/collaborators` | Access control and collaborators management |
| `/documents/{id}/realtime` | Endpoint for real-time collaboration (via WebSocket or similar) |

---

## 2. **API Endpoints**

### **A. Document Management**

| Method | Endpoint | Description | Request Body | Response | Notes |
|---------|------------|--------------|--------------|----------|--------|
| `POST` | `/documents` | Create a new document | `{ "title": "string", "content": "string" }` | `{ "id": "uuid", "title": "string", "owner": "user_id", "createdAt": "timestamp" }` | Creates a new document owned by the creator |
| `GET` | `/documents/{id}` | Retrieve document metadata | — | `{ "id": "uuid", "title": "string", "owner": "user_id", "content": "string", "createdAt": "timestamp", "updatedAt": "timestamp" }` | Access controlled |
| `PUT` | `/documents/{id}` | Update document content | `{ "title": "string", "content": "string" }` | Updated document metadata | Only allowed if user has write access |
| `DELETE` | `/documents/{id}` | Delete a document | — | 204 No Content | Only owner or admin |

---

### **B. Versioning**

| Method | Endpoint | Description | Request Body | Response | Notes |
|---------|------------|--------------|--------------|----------|--------|
| `POST` | `/documents/{id}/versions` | Save a new version (manual or auto) | `{ "content": "string", "note": "string" }` | `{ "versionId": "uuid", "timestamp": "timestamp", "note": "string" }` | Can be triggered automatically on save or manually |
| `GET` | `/documents/{id}/versions` | List all versions | — | `[ { "versionId": "uuid", "timestamp": "timestamp", "note": "string" }, ... ]` | Supports pagination |
| `GET` | `/documents/{id}/versions/{versionId}` | Retrieve specific version | — | `{ "versionId": "uuid", "content": "string", "timestamp": "timestamp", "note": "string" }` | View previous states |

---

### **C. Access Control / Collaborators**
